step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, hair color and styling, body proportions, cream ribbed cropped tank and matching cream high-waist leggings, gold huggie earrings and pendant necklace, bare feet, and the entire pilates studio scene including the floor-to-ceiling mirror, sage-green reformer machine, warm marble floor, exposed brick wall, and tall window — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. She is now holding the Alluvi product in her left hand at chest level: her left arm bent at the elbow, wrist relaxed, thumb pressed flat on the front face of the box near the top, four fingers wrapping the back edge, the box held perpendicular to her body so the front face points directly at the mirror — the mirror reflection in the frame must show the box's front face clearly readable. The product is approximately 7 inches wide, sized realistically relative to her hand. Her body posture and arm angle may shift slightly to make the holding pose look natural and not stamped on. Both hands must remain visible in the frame — her right hand continues to hold the phone at face level capturing the mirror reflection, her left hand visibly grips the product. Do not hide either hand in pockets, behind her back, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color, only apply the scene's directional lighting on top. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: soft warm natural daylight pouring through the tall window on her left, late afternoon, with a gentle warm rim on her left side and a soft shadow falling toward her right.
